title: Telehealth Triage Agent with OPQRST Protocol
description: A telehealth triage agent that captures patient symptoms using the OPQRST protocol, screens for red-flag conditions (cardiac, stroke, sepsis, surgical, mental health), scores severity, and routes patients to the appropriate care level (emergency, urgent care, scheduled visit, or self-care). Escalates to a live nurse immediately on any red flag or protocol uncertainty.

tools.name: capture_symptom
tools.description: Captures patient symptom details using OPQRST protocol

tools.name: score_severity
tools.description: Scores symptom severity based on clinical criteria

tools.name: route_to_care_level
tools.description: Routes patient to appropriate care level (emergency, urgent care, scheduled visit, self-care)

tools.name: escalate_to_nurse
tools.description: Escalates call to live nurse for red flags or protocol uncertainty

tools.name: log_to_ehr
tools.description: Logs triage documentation to electronic health record
